lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: First day in school in a long time. Better start off on a the right foot..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Lets see what the guys are up to.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: when youre ready to start your school day sit at your table: second row, second column

menu_entry.text: |School days take up most of the day. Make sure to do everything you needed to do before going to school.|
I hate this place. School is like prison just less criminals and more insecure and power-hungry teachers. Especially Miss Carter.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Okay everyone!

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Please sit down at your desks.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Seems like everybodys here..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: So lets start the lesson.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Miss carter, the history teacher, a well mannered but just as strict teacher

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Better not stand out too much

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Anybody willing to take the hit and volunteer for the oral exam?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: everybody acts like theyre didnt hear her

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Oh what a surprise..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: You know, its not that hard to study and come prepared people!

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: If you applied yourself at home, you wouldnt have to be sweating right now..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well, if nobody want to be the tribute today. Im afraid Ill have to chose one of you myself..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: It doesnt bring me any satisfaction to do this, but you left me no choice.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Lets do it the old fashion way.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Its the mopst fair. Ill add up the day of the month, the month of the year..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: And decrease by the amount of empty seats.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: That comes up to number three.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Lets see..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: David. Is David here today?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Yes..

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Everybody looks at David.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Jake looks at you from the table in front of you.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Thats the new guy right? The one everybodys talking about?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: He looks like a weirdo. Where is he-

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Jake, would you like to replace David? With the amount of talking youre currently doing it would seem so.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: No miss carter. Im sorry. Please continue.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well david. Come up here so that i can hear you better.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Im old Im afraid and you speak very soflty.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: David slowly gets up. Its clear the stress is not coming from the lack of knowledge but the amount of attention drawn to him.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: He trips over himself as he shuffles towards the whiteboard

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: So lets start from the begining. Please tell us what we have gone through last week?

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Its chapter 7 young man..if you have studied you will surely recall.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Im sorry but I..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Speak clearly, David.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: My family just moved here and I didnt have the time to review the material for todays lesson.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well at least you took the time to come up with a good excuse.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: David..since youre new to my class, Ill explain how things work here.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Each day one person has to recap what we leared last lesson. They are graded for it according to how well they perform.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Since youre new, I will not give you an F. But I will remeber this performance of yours. And next time the pen lands on your name I wont be this merciful.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: And yes, this time I specificaly chose you instead of randomly choosing just to make it clear youre not excluded out of our raffle.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Go sit child.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: David looks like hes about to die. Sweat dripping, heart pounding.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: After todays recap the lesson proceeds further. Nothing of importance happenes

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well, Pupils. It seems that our time is up. Make sure to prepare yourself for the test next week.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: And dont forget to study for all the other subjects too! I dont want a situation like that one to happen again.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Miss carter was smiling and energetic even after an hour of teaching. She clearly enjoys her work.

lines.text: Dont forget to study! A mind needs books like a..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Uhh..well- a minds needs books thats for certain.

lines.speaker: teacher

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: And as usual ill show you the random number so you know im not making it up.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The teacher takes out her smart calculator and show it to the class.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: And that would be...number four.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Jake.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Jake looks at you like hes done for.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Fuck me..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well come on up, Jake.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Jake walks up to the teacher full knowing his fate.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: So lets start from the begining. Please tell us what we have gone through last week.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: ehh..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Its chapter 9 young man..if you have studied you will surely recall.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: I know. But I studies several of them yesterday. If you could remind me which one was from last lesson?

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: The Roman Empire..

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Right. So the Roman empire was an ancient kingdom.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: And after two and a half centuries it became a republic..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Correct

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well. You are half correct I suppose. There was also a regime change in 27 BC right?

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Indeed!

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: It became uhh..

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: An empire.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Yes Jake. Very good. Try to speak with a bit more confidence and I might even think you studied all the chapters you claim you did.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: I did study!

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Everything I said is correct.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: yet you arent sure about any of it. Can you tell me about the Punic wars?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Jakes recap while more or less correct in its claims proceeded to be very slow and somewhat innacurate

lines.speaker: neutral

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: And that would be...number one. Which is..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Lets see..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Boniface.

lines.speaker: boniface
lines.text: Of course its me..Lying bit-

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The teacher looks at Boniface. Then at his afro. Then at his clearly innapropriate street clothes.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Jake looks at you wide eyed.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: He whispers to you.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Here we go again.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: He called her a bitch.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Boniface. You should be counting yourself lucky you are even allowed to attend this class.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Do not think yourself so important as to make ME care about YOU. I have never and will never go out of my way to speak to a Ni-

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Nitwit, like you.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The whole class went silent.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: After a prolonged do-not-blink contest between Boniface and Miss Carter Candy finally broke the silence.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Miss Carter?

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Yes Candy?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Can I volunteer?

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Boniface you will come up here this instance or you can go straight to the pricipals office. Your choice.

lines.speaker: boniface
lines.text: I will never go out of my way to talk to a..

lines.speaker: boniface
lines.text: snob white trash bitch.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The teachers face was bright red by now and the yelling was now innevitable.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: This was the last straw!

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: I will make sure youre expelled for this. Ill make sure you never get to a decent school ever!

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: And I know that you know I can do that.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Without a word Boniface left the classroom.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Miss Carter composes herself.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Apologies for the interuption. I think it wise to just skip the recap for today. Lets continue with the lesson.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The lesson continues without any further interruptions.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well, Pupils. It seems that our time is up.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Dont forget to study! Unlike some members of your society all of you can be whatever you want.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: As long as you work hard.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Miss carter was smiling and energetic. She seems to have forgotten about the scene.

lines.text: Oh yeah. It is.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Youre always ready Candy. See everybody? You should take notes.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: *Not everybody is as perfect as Candy..*

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Candy gets up from her seat without any fuss.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Its chapter 8 right Miss Carter?

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: It is indeed.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: So lets start from the begining. The Byzantine Empire was a..

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Candy proceeds to talk for about 10 minutes, only ocasionally being stopped by the teacher.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Excelent work Candy. Exceptional.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Thats an A for you young lady.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: As candy moved towards her seat she slips you a paper.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Alright people. Lets get to what we need to get to today.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The lesson continues..

menu_entry.text:
Hey. wanted to ask you if you could help me with something....But only you please. 
			*several crossed out sentences* Can we meet near the creek durring the night? *uniteligeable text* So yeah be descreete about it.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well, Pupils. It seems that our time is up. Excelent work today Candy. As always.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Miss carter was smiling and energetic even after an hour of teaching. Undoubtedly also because of candys stellar performance.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: *What is on that paper from Candy..*

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: theres nothing for you to do here now. School is over
